roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: VINCENT GO, STATE PAROLE AGENT, ALSO PRESENT,/PDP//X:THE DA'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGE VIOLATION #3 - 602 PC, TRESPASSING, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSIONIS AS TO VIOLATION #3 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:44 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVECREDIT FOR 15 DAYS,/4019HALF/SAORD/SA4:TREASURE ISLAND, SAN FRANCISCO/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #1 AND #2 FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED WITH NO TIME LOSS AND TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THEPAROLE AGENT,/
